title: The Prompt is the Platform - Dominik Tornow, Resonate HQ
summary: Dominik Tornow discusses how coding agents challenge traditional software engineering by synthesizing bespoke systems on demand rather than using general-purpose libraries and frameworks. He covers where agents fail, where they succeed, and how to make specifications and prompts the core platform for agentic systems.
writeup: Dominik Tornow of Resonate HQ argues that coding agents disrupt traditional software engineering by synthesizing bespoke systems on demand rather than depending on general-purpose libraries and frameworks. The talk maps where agents succeed and where they fail, and proposes a workflow in which the prompt becomes the platform and the specification becomes the product. The framing matters because it shifts the unit of engineering from reusable code toward spec-driven development.
